description: A loading screen is displayed with rotating airline logos (Qatar Airways, Philippine Airlines) while flight results are being fetched.
frame_description: The screen shows a central loading modal over a background image of a beach and blue sky.

description: The flight search results page finishes loading, transitioning from the loading state to the 'Select Departing Flight' view.
frame_description: The loading modal disappears and is replaced by a list of flight options from Adelaide to Melbourne.

description: The user remains stationary, first waiting for the results to load and then beginning to review the flight options presented on the screen.
